title: Song of Zazen
description: Hakuin's verse on the identity of samsara and nirvana: this very place is the lotus land, this very body the Buddha.
introduction: Hakuin's verse on the identity of samsara and nirvana: this very place is the lotus land, this very body the Buddha.

translation.text: All beings are from the very beginning Buddhas. It is like water and ice: apart from water, no ice.
